name: Gusto
description: Monitor Gusto employee records for HR compliance, access management, and employee verification

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Gusto Developer Portal (dev.gusto.com)
2. Create a new application
3. Add redirect URL: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Request scopes: employees:read, companies:read
5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews active Gusto employees for access management

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies that all Gusto employees have email addresses for verification
